maintainerConventions: Thank reporters and ask for concrete reproduction details, logs, crash dumps, screenshots, and environment data when they are missing.
Do not promise implementation or roadmap commitments unless the repository documentation already supports them.
When duplicate evidence is incomplete, keep the issue open and ask for maintainer review instead of closing it.

needs-info.description: More reporter details are needed before maintainers can act

needs-human-review.description: Automation could not safely finish triage without a maintainer review

duplicate.description: This issue appears to be fully covered by another open issue

question.description: Reporter is primarily asking a question or support-style request

security.description: Security-sensitive report requiring careful maintainer review

build/install.description: Build, packaging, installation, or setup problem

performance.description: Performance, efficiency, or runtime cost issue
